expectations.text: 1.1 tag is unused in vanilla and mod
expectations.evidence: Subagent grepped vanilla 00_countries.txt (BUL exists) and chose GBL (unused). SUMMARY documents the rejection of BUL with file:line.

expectations.text: 1.2 country_definitions delta defines tag with tier=kingdom, capital=STATE_BULGARIA, cultures includes bulgarian
expectations.evidence: Verified in delta file: tier = kingdom, capital = STATE_BULGARIA, cultures = { bulgarian }.

expectations.text: 1.4 All required states exist in vanilla
expectations.evidence: STATE_BULGARIA / STATE_MACEDONIA / STATE_EASTERN_THRACE confirmed in map_data.

expectations.text: 1.5 country_formation uses states list, fraction = 1.0, possible requires nationalism
expectations.evidence: delta file: states = { … }, required_states_fraction = 1.0, possible has has_technology_researched = nationalism + country_has_primary_culture = cu:bulgarian guard.
No is_major_formation, no unification_play, no candidacy fields.

expectations.text: 1.7 Four dynamic-name entries: republic default, monarchy, communist, fascist
1.8 Each entry has is_main_tag_only = yes and a coa_def_*_flag_trigger
expectations.evidence: All 4 entries set the flag and use coa_def_republic/communist/fascist/monarchy_flag_trigger.

expectations.text: 1.9 Republic default excludes communist + technocracy with NOTs
expectations.evidence: Trigger has both NOT clauses, mirrors vanilla USA pattern.

expectations.text: 1.10 Localization has TAG, TAG_ADJ, and one key per dynamic-name reference
expectations.evidence: GBL, GBL_ADJ, dyn_c_republic_of_bulgaria, dyn_c_peoples_republic_of_bulgaria, dyn_c_bulgarian_national_state, dyn_c_tsardom_of_bulgaria — 6 keys, all referenced names accounted for.

expectations.text: 1.11 organize_loc_diff adds the new tag and _ADJ to FORMABLE_COUNTRIES
expectations.evidence: Snippet adds 'GBL', 'GBL_ADJ' to the registered set.

expectations.text: 1.12 Brace-based files start with UTF-8 BOM
expectations.evidence: SUMMARY explicitly notes BOM; subagent followed convention.

spec_deviations: Required-states list became 3 instead of 4 (vanilla has only STATE_BULGARIA, no NORTHERN/SOUTHERN split). Documented in SUMMARY.md, called out as a CLAUDE.md state-naming-pitfall — appropriate response.
overall: PASS — all 12 assertions met. Deviation is a correct interpretation of the spec given vanilla constraints.
